title: Herbal Oyster Pazza
description: A herbal, dense, nostalgic Uruguayan dish featuring oysters in a pressure-cooked dish that is also fodmap-friendly.
instructions: Wash and clean the oysters thoroughly.
In a pressure cooker, combine the cleaned oysters, chopped herbs (thyme, rosemary, basil), garlic, and olives. Season with salt to taste.
Pressure cook for about 15-20 minutes at high pressure or follow the manufacturer's instructions for your specific model.
Allow the mixture to naturally release pressure before carefully venting it.
